_comment: Copy to gate-upstreams.json (gitignored) and set your real upstream per resource. On a valid /serve the gatekeeper proxies to `url` with `method`, your `headers` (e.g. an upstream API key), an optional fixed `body` (string or JSON object — e.g. a JSON-RPC call), plus injected X-LSL-User / X-LSL-Resource, and relays the response verbatim. `timeoutMs` optional (default 15000). Omit a resource to fall back to the placeholder.
_research_access_note: research-access points at the Living Science Lab IP-asset service (~/living-science-lab/serve.py) on loopback — it returns the AI-ready dataset + provenance manifest. Run that service co-located with the gatekeeper; it must NOT be publicly exposed. Optionally set ASSET_SHARED_SECRET there and add a matching X-Gate-Secret to headers below.
